_comment: Verdict-machinery pins: files whose content decides what a green result means.
tracked-source-drift gate reports changed / unpinned / missing / removed.
Entries may be literals or globs.
DELIBERATELY NOT PINNED: the individual tests under scripts/test/.
Test bodies change in most PRs, so pinning them would force a re-pin nearly
every time — and a pin rebuilt reflexively asserts nothing. What IS pinned is
the machinery deciding what a test RESULT MEANS: gate definitions, the
runners, the verifier libs, and the CI profile. Those change rarely, so drift
in them is signal rather than noise.
Test bodies have NO independent cover here: .github/CODEOWNERS lists them but
is inert without required code-owner review (not enabled; unsatisfiable for a
solo maintainer). Residual documented in docs/34-threat-model.md s12.
